pytorch.reason: load-bearing: torch tensors for all three group elements (GL, O, SO); simultaneous validity verified via det and M^TM checks; triple non-commutativity A∘B∘C ≠ C∘B∘A computed via torch.mm; triple intersection SO(3)∩O(3)∩GL(3)=SO(3) verified numerically.

pyg.reason: not used in GL3+O3+SO3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves det=0 (outside GL) is incompatible with M^TM=I (inside O) AND det=+1 (inside SO); the GL exclusion and O/SO membership constraints are mutually exclusive in dimension 1 (and by extension 3); structural impossibility is the primary proof form.

cvc5.reason: not used in GL3+O3+SO3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sympy verifies GL→O→SO composition equals GL→SO shortcut via symbolic Gram-Schmidt pipeline on a concrete 3×3 integer matrix; confirms the composition is order-preserving (no path-dependence).

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Cl(3,0) distinguishes Pin(3) (O(3) double cover, odd+even versors) from Spin(3) (SO(3) double cover, even subalgebra only); the GL→O step corresponds to passing from arbitrary grade-1 scalings to unit versors; the O→SO step is exactly the passage from Pin(3) to Spin(3) (even grades only).

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: geomstats SpecialOrthogonal(n=3) samples SO(3) elements; each sampled element is verified to pass GL(3), O(3), and SO(3) tests simultaneously, confirming triple coexistence from the manifold side.

e3nn.reason: not used in GL3+O3+SO3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: rustworkx G-tower DAG with GL/O/SO nodes; verifies GL→O→SO path has length 2; all three nodes reachable from GL; SO is the shared face of both GL↔O and O↔SO pairwise edges.

xgi.reason: load-bearing: xgi hypergraph with the triple coexistence hyperedge {GL, O, SO}; verifies cardinality 3; confirms this is the only 3-clique at the top of the tower (no other 3-way coexistence claimed).

toponetx.reason: not used in GL3+O3+SO3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

gudhi.reason: load-bearing: gudhi Vietoris-Rips complex on a sample of SO(3) ≅ RP^3 (represented as unit quaternions on S^3); verifies H0=1 (connected); persistence diagram is non-empty, confirming topological structure.

triple_shells_simultaneously_active.detail: GL(3,R) ∋ A, O(3) ∋ B, SO(3) ∋ C all simultaneously well-defined

triple_noncommutativity_ABC_ne_CBA.detail: A∘B∘C ≠ C∘B∘A: triple composition is order-sensitive (ratchet direction)

triple_intersection_equals_SO3.detail: SO(3) element passes all three tests: SO(3) ⊂ O(3) ⊂ GL(3); intersection = SO(3)

GL3_element_not_in_O3_or_SO3.detail: Generic GL(3,R) element is not in O(3) or SO(3): shells are strictly nested

z3_det0_AND_orthogonal_UNSAT.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=0 AND M^TM=I cannot both hold; GL exclusion ⊥ O membership

z3_triple_exclusion_UNSAT.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=0 AND orthogonal AND det=+1 all impossible simultaneously

z3_SO3_membership_SAT.detail: z3 SAT: x^2=1 AND x=+1 AND x≠0 is consistent; SO(3) element admitted by all three

sympy_GL_to_O_to_SO_composition.detail: sympy: GL→O (Gram-Schmidt) → SO (det-fix) yields det=+1 orthogonal matrix

sympy_GL_to_O_to_SO_equals_GL_to_SO.detail: GL→O→SO and GL→SO shortcut agree: composition is order-preserving

clifford_spin3_even_grade_covers_SO3.detail: Spin(3) rotor: even grades only (g1=g3=0), unit norm; double covers SO(3)

clifford_pin3_odd_grade_covers_O3_minus_.detail: Pin(3) odd versor: grade-1 only; double covers O(3)\SO(3) reflections

clifford_O_to_SO_is_even_grade_projectio.detail: O(3)→SO(3) corresponds to Pin(3)→Spin(3): keeping only even-grade multivectors

clifford_GL3_non_unit_outside_O3.detail: GL(3)\O(3) element: scaled vector has n^2=4≠1, not in Pin(3)/O(3)

geomstats_SO3_samples_pass_all_three.detail: geomstats SO(3) samples pass GL(3), O(3), and SO(3) tests simultaneously

rustworkx_GL_O_SO_path_length_2.detail: GL(3)→O(3)→SO(3) path has length 2 in G-tower DAG

rustworkx_all_three_reachable.detail: All three G-tower nodes (GL, O, SO) reachable from GL root

rustworkx_SO3_shared_face.detail: SO(3) is the shared endpoint of both pairwise edges; it is the terminal face

rustworkx_topological_order_GL_O_SO.detail: Topological sort: GL(3) < O(3) < SO(3) (decreasing constraint depth)

xgi_triple_hyperedge_cardinality_3.detail: xgi: exactly one 3-clique hyperedge {GL,O,SO} with cardinality 3

xgi_all_three_nodes_present.detail: All three G-tower nodes present as xgi hypergraph nodes

xgi_pairwise_edges_are_subfaces.detail: Both pairwise edges (GL↔O, O↔SO) are sub-faces of the triple hyperedge

gudhi_SO3_H0_rank_1_connected.detail: gudhi Rips on SO(3)≅RP^3 sample: H0 has exactly 1 infinite class (connected); persistence diagram non-empty (non-trivial topology detected)

singular_matrix_fails_GL3.detail: Rank-2 matrix has det=0: fails GL(3,R) test (not invertible)

det_minus1_passes_O3_fails_SO3.detail: Reflection (det=-1) passes O(3) test but fails SO(3) test (orientation constraint)

scaling_passes_GL3_fails_O3.detail: Scaling matrix diag(2,1,1): in GL(3,R), not in O(3) (M^TM ≠ I)

rotation_at_pi_in_SO3.detail: Rotation by pi: boundary of Spin(3) normalization (rotor = -1), still in SO(3)

perturbed_identity_passes_GL_fails_O_SO.detail: diag(1+eps,1,1): in GL(3,R) (det≈1+eps≠0), fails O(3) and SO(3) (M^TM≠I)

random_O3_sign_corrected_to_SO3.detail: O(3) element with det=-1 mapped to SO(3) by last-column sign flip (O→SO step)
